articles.description: XRP Breaks Above the 2020 Highs. Now What? (Ripple 2021 Forecast). As we correctly predicted several months ago in January (and February) of this year, XRP has managed to recover from its panic lows (after it had crashed) and rally above the the 2020 resistance highs. Recently XRP hit just above the $1 level. So the big question is what is the likely wave count for XRP, based on elliott wave theory?
